description: Lead411 is a B2B sales intelligence platform providing unlimited verified contact data, direct dials, and buyer intent signals starting at $49/month.
tagline: Unlimited B2B leads strengthened by intent data
overview: Lead411 is a B2B sales intelligence platform that gives sales teams and marketers unlimited access to verified emails, direct dials, and real-time intent signals to build and prioritize their pipelines. It integrates with leading CRMs and outreach tools so prospecting workflows stay connected end to end.
what_is: Lead411 is a B2B lead generation and sales intelligence platform built to help sales teams and marketers find current, verified contact information at scale. It belongs to the sales intelligence and lead data category, and its standout feature is unlimited search and export access starting at $49 per month, paired with verified emails and direct dials covering millions of companies.

The platform is well suited for identifying decision-makers, targeting accounts that show growth or active hiring signals, and enriching existing lead records to accelerate pipeline building. Real-time data and intent signals mean teams can take action immediately after setup rather than waiting for data to populate. Lead411 connects with popular CRMs such as Salesforce and HubSpot, as well as outreach platforms like Outreach.io, so prospecting and lead management stay in sync.

Lead411 is focused on B2B data and sales intelligence and is not designed for consumer lead targeting or marketing automation. Teams that need broader campaign execution tools will want to pair it with a dedicated marketing platform, using Lead411 to supply the high-quality contact data those tools require.
